summary: Completed comprehensive testing of F1 Learning Hub educational website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with proper F1 branding, authentication flow operational, quiz system functional, and progress tracking/bookmarking features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Quiz option buttons occasionally require force clicks due to modal overlay interception

passed_tests: F1 teams and drivers data loading (10 teams, 20 drivers)
Quiz system (all 3 quiz types: basics, flags, strategy)
Profile page access with progress and bookmarks sections
Navigation smooth scrolling to all sections
F1 branding and design (proper colors, fonts, layout)
Brute force protection (lockout after 5 failed attempts)
